text:
Created attachment 187575
patch to update the port

- Update 1.22 --> 1.23
Changes: https://github.com/mrscotty/connector/commits/master

- "portlint -AC" just warns about non-empty $FreeBSD$ tag.

- Tested with poudriere 3.1.99.20171005 at 11.1-release amd64
with perl 5.24.3 and openssl from base.

- Buil-in perl tests say: "PASS".
